LinkedIn Ads.description: Selected because it provides high-precision targeting for B2B professionals, driving high expected ROI for corporate audiences despite a higher Cost-Per-Registration of $85.00.

Google Search Ads.description: Selected because it captures high-intent searches from prospects actively seeking topics, offering strong conversion rates and a balanced Cost-Per-Registration of $45.00.

Meta Ads (FB/IG).description: Selected because it reaches broad consumer/community audiences with high visual engagement, maintaining a low Cost-Per-Registration of $35.00 and solid ROI.

Tech Newsletters.description: Selected because it directly reaches niche developer/technology audiences with pre-established trust, leading to high-quality leads at a Cost-Per-Registration of $50.00.

TikTok Ads.description: Selected because it offers low-cost, short-form video reach for youth/consumer segments, optimizing budget with a low Cost-Per-Registration of $25.00.

Email Marketing.description: Selected because it leverages owned lists for maximum ROI, delivering low-cost sign-ups at a minimal Cost-Per-Registration of $10.00.

Local Event Listings.description: Selected because it targets hyper-local community traffic for regional events, offering cheap localized conversions at a Cost-Per-Registration of $15.00.
